snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвҖӢвҖӢ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвҖӢвҖӢ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвҖӢвҖӢ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвҖӢвҖӢ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвҖӢвҖӢ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвҖӢвҖӢ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвҖҷs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch JimвҖҷs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go sub to Perogi with Scammer Payback too- 
https://youtube.com/c/ScammerPayback

snippet.description:
вҖңMene je silovao moj kolega i dragi prijatelj Branislav LeДҚiДҮ, u maju 2012. godine. Posle ДҚetiri dana igrali smo predstavu. Bila sam u ЕЎoku. Htela sam odmah da zovem policiju, ali sam razmiЕЎljala ЕЎta ДҮe se desiti. Morate da razumete to stanjeвҖң, kaЕҫe u ekskluzivnom intervjuu za Insajder glumica Danijela Е tajnfeld.
Danijela Е tajnfeld je iz Njujorka gde Еҫivi veДҮ godinama, doputovala u Beograd kako bi dala izjavu tuЕҫilaЕЎtvu, a u opЕЎirnoj ispovesti za Insajder glumica prvi put pred kamerama opisuje sam dogaД‘aj koji se odigrao u maju 2012.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: Dinamo vs. Tottenham FULL RECAP: Every talking point from Jose MourinhoвҖҷs latest failure | ESPN FC
snippet.description:
Tottenham waltzed into Stadion Maksimir nursing a 2-0 lead from leg one and left humiliated and out of the UEFA Europa League, losing 3-2 on aggregate to Dinamo Zagreb following a dramatic hat trick from Mislav Orsic. Don Hutchison, Shaka Hislop and Stewart Robson take aim at Gareth Bale, Harry Kane and the rest of the Spurs squad for not looking interested and at Jose Mourinho, wondering if his career is finally over after failing to improve yet another squad.

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вҖңI crossed a line IвҖҷd never crossed in addiction.вҖқ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Pre-order Demi LovatoвҖҷs new album вҖҳDancing With The DevilвҖҰ The Art Of Starting OverвҖҷ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Kehilangan Kendali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
вҖңAku melewati batas yang tak pernah aku lewati karena kecanduan.вҖқ

Di bagian I dari serial dokumenter yang tak kenal takut ini, Demi Lovato, bersama keluarga dan teman-temannya, terus terang terbuka untuk pertama kali tentang apa yang menuntunnya pada overdosis yang nyaris mematikan.

snippet.title: Doctor Reacts To Awkward Medical Memes Ep. 16
snippet.description:
The medical memes just keep getting weirder! Today we talk about tonsil stones, Harry Potter, nasal tests, first year med students, gal bladder/gal stones, skeletons, the sun, pizza, cutting carbs, and someone out there made me into a Pokemon card. What a world. Got some medical memes you want me to see? Then them over and I may react to them in my next video!

I LOVE reading your comments and take your suggestions seriously. If thereвҖҷs a subject you want me to discuss or something youвҖҷd like for me to react to, leave a comment down below. Many of my videos have been born out of suggestions directly from you, so donвҖҷt hold back!

snippet.title: 5 minutes from death : Dancing with the Devil

вҖңI knew that what IвҖҷd been looking for, I hadnвҖҷt found yet. But what I had been looking for was not in the form of a drug.вҖқ
Demi and her closest confidants give a firsthand account of the aftermath of the overdose as she wakes up in the hospital after being minutes away from death.

Episode 3 available March 30 @ 12p PT

SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: PraviДҮete ih stalno! MiriЕЎu do komЕЎija. Banana keksiДҮi za post na vodi, tako mekani i ukusni.
snippet.description:
HIT keksiДҮi kod mene u kuДҮi. UkuДҮani stalno traЕҫe da im pravim. Mogu da stoje par dana, u kutiji kao i svi drugi keksi. UЕҫivajte!
#posnireceptinavodi #posnikolaci #banane
bez ulja
bez jaja bez mleka
sa bananama
serpica recepti

Recept na blogu:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/banana-keksici-post-na-vodi.html

Sastojci:
- 300 gr. braЕЎna
- 2 banane
- 3 kaЕЎike dЕҫema
- 100 gr. ЕЎeДҮera u prahu
- vanila
- limunova korica
- prstohvat soli
- 10 gr. praЕЎka za pecivo

Za premaz:
- 1 kaЕЎika dЕҫema
- 2 kaЕЎike vode

*200 stepeni oko 20 minuta

 ENG:
Ingredients:
- 300 gr. flour
- 2 bananas
- 3 tablespoons of jam
- 100 gr. powdered sugar
- vanilla
- lemon zest
- pinch of salt
- 10 gr. baking powder

For coating:
- 1 tablespoon of jam
- 2 tablespoons of water

* 200 degrees for about 20 minutes
cake, cookies, vegan,food, bananas, recipes,

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвҖҷs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonвҖҷt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвҖҷs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee JhenГ© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, sГӨje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); sГӨje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: KuДҮa od srca S07, porodica VeliДҚkoviДҮ 02  PINK 28. 03. 12h premijerna epizoda porodice VeliДҚkoviДҮ 03
snippet.description: Projekat "KuДҮa od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugroЕҫenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajedniДҚke ciljeve i prikljuДҚilo se projektu вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ u pomoДҮi pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugroЕҫenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ uz podrЕЎku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vraДҮene u obrazovni sistem ЕЎto rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ДҚlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlaД‘e ДҚlanove druЕЎtva. Osnovna ideja projekta вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ jeste ukljuДҚivanje celokupne zajednice u pomoДҮ porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva proglaЕЎene najugroЕҫenijim. Ono ЕЎto izdvaja serijal вҖңKuДҮa od srcaвҖқ, jeste ДҚinjenica da je to prvi domaДҮi rijaliti, koji se pored reЕЎavanja stambenog pitanja kroz graД‘evinske radove, bavi i reЕЎavanjem porodiДҚnih i meД‘uljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuДҮe po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavrЕЎava, objekat ostaje u zateДҚenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuДҚi I pomogne u zavrЕЎetku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbliЕҫih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju KuДҮe od srca . 3. NajbliЕҫi ДҚlanovi porodice, prijatelji I komЕЎije moraju imati pozitivno miЕЎljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ДҚlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druЕЎtveno odgovorni : da nisu uЕҫivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraЕҫenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ДҚlan porodice koji je uДҚesnik serijala prekrЕЎi bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

Punoletni ДҚlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druЕЎtveno odgovorni : da nisu uЕҫivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraЕҫenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ДҚlan porodice koji je uДҚesnik serijala prekrЕЎi bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

snippet.title: The Rise of Faceless Creators
snippet.description:
YouTube's top performers in the past couple of years have had a very intriguing common feature - they are faceless. Whether it's Dream, Corpse Husband, the VTuber community, and many more - it seems like keeping the mystery and protecting their privacy has been a priority. In this video we take a look at this relatively new trend that seems to be gaining popularity. 

------------------------------
SOURCES:

Teen trust youtubers more than their own family:
https://mediakix.com/blog/percent-children-becoming-a-youtuber/

1956 study on parasocial relationships:
http://visual-memory.co.uk/daniel/Documents/short/horton_and_wohl_1956.html

Stalker goes to youtuberвҖҷs home:
https://www.bbc.com/news/uk-england-merseyside-46986529

The Verge: вҖңYouTubers are not your friendsвҖқ
https://www.theverge.com/2018/9/17/17832948/youtube-youtubers-influencer-creator-fans-subscribers-friends-celebrities



------------------------------
CREDITS:

Andrei Terbea - Lead Animator

Stefan Popa - Assistant Animator
https://www.instagram.com/jtefe.ro/

Nicoleta Toader - Producer

------------------------------
MUSIC:

Background track:  "Delusional (Instrumental)" by Spring Gang
Outro song: Joakim Karud - "Loudness & Clarity"
http://youtube.com/joakimkarud


------------------------------
#Faceless #CorpseHusband #VTuber

Whether it's Dream, Corpse Husband, the VTuber community, and many more - it seems like keeping the mystery and protecting their privacy has been a priority. In this video we take a look at this relatively new trend that seems to be gaining popularity.

snippet.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рҹҳӮ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

en.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
en.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рҹҳӮ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Sta Bi Se Desilo Kad Bi Svi Prdnuli U isto Vreme ?
snippet.description:
Ko ne lajkuje video nije dobar covek рҹҳҒ

Svi smo nekad u zivotu prdnuli, nekad pustimo one stidljive gasove koje niko ne primeti, nekad one sto smrde, nekad one glasne, a nekad uz neke od njih ide i iznenadjenje. Ali sta bi se desilo kad bi u isto vreme, svi ljudi na planeti, bez imalo stida, prdnuli. Da li bi to uticalo na kvalitet vazduha ? Koliko bi se osecalo ? I sta bi jedna sibica mogla da uradi, hajmo da saznamo.

Podrzite nas na Patreonu: https://bit.ly/2DY7fn3
Mail za Saradnju/Business email: BojanZlatarevic@gmail.com

snippet.description:

Follow KSI 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ksi/

Follow YUNGBLUD

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/yungblud/?hl=en 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/yungblud/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/yungblud?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6Ad91Jof8Niiw0lGLLi3NW?si=xFennoJfSbasocQ702eXrg 

Follow Polo G

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/polo.capalot/?hl=en 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pologofficial/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Polo_Capalot?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AgTAQt8XS6jRWi4sX7w49?si=YTISKuMXQ92gSOXmi5m_Gw 

Lyrics: 

KSI
Little bit  little bit 
I Need a little bit of patience
Coz we be going through changes
 
Polo G
Ah, ah no patience iвҖҷve had enough.
Spent too much time through these phases, itвҖҷs just not adding up
Felt all alone on those stages.
Wanna get my passion up,
ItвҖҷs over, pack it up
DonвҖҷt walk away from me.
When the night falls, make the right call.
Or sheвҖҷll be gone forever.
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos weвҖҷve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations
And my heart wonвҖҷt change
If my head donвҖҷt break
I need a little bit of patience
Cos weвҖҷve been going through changes
 
KSI
Woooooahhhhhh
Need a little space to slow the brain
I donвҖҷt really wanna feel the pain.
Seen a lot of shit to make me hate
I donвҖҷt wanna hide until itвҖҷs too late
Feels like iвҖҷm gonna break
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos weвҖҷve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations
And my heart wonвҖҷt change
If my head donвҖҷt break
I need a little bit of patience
Cos weвҖҷve been going through changes
 
 
KSI
Woooooahhhhhh
Bridges burning, i wonвҖҷt let you get to me
Tables turning i donвҖҷt need bad energy
Now iвҖҷm learning, lying bout our chemistry
No returnin, 
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos weвҖҷve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations
And my heart wonвҖҷt change
If my head donвҖҷt break
I need a little bit of patience
Cos weвҖҷve been going through changes
 
 
KSI
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos weвҖҷve been going through changes

snippet.title: DINAMO vs GORICA 1:0 (26.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
Dinamo nije napravio krivi korak ni u 26. kolu HT Prve lige. U zahtjevnom domaДҮem ogledu Dinamo je s 1:0 svladao Goricu.

VeДҮ u prvoj minuti Dinamo je bio sasvim blizu pogotka, ali je BaniДҮ zaustavio PetkoviДҮev udarac, dok je u nastavku akcije Majer pogodio okvir vrata.

Gorica se relativno brzo posloЕҫila na travnjaku i solidno parirala, iako je i dalje Dinamo bio taj koji je opasnije napadao. Prilike su propuЕЎtali Majer, PetkoviДҮ i OrЕЎiДҮ, dok je na drugoj strani najopasniji bio Matar Dieye.

Prvo poluvrijeme je zavrЕЎilo bez golova, no veДҮ u 47. minuti se zatresla gostujuДҮa mreЕҫa. Strijelac je bio Bruno PetkoviДҮ ЕЎto je na kraju bio kljuДҚni trenutak derbija.

Vrlo brzo nakon toga se teЕЎko ozlijedio igraДҚ Gorice Suk, a Dinamo je relativno mirno odrЕҫavao minimalnu prednost. No, mogao je u sudaДҚkoj nadoknadi Matar ЕЎokirati Dinamo, ali je njegov udarac zavrЕЎio na okviru vrata.

Dinamo se vratio na vrh ljestvice (dva boda viЕЎe od Osijeka), s time da ima i jednu odigranu utakmicu manje.

HT Prva liga, 26. kolo: Dinamo - Gorica 1:0 (PetkoviДҮ 47.)

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - theyвҖҷre only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

ItвҖҷs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isвҖҰ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

WeвҖҷve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoвҖҷs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itвҖҷll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the LamboвҖҷs bonnet, youвҖҷll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatвҖҷs not allвҖҰ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? ThereвҖҷs only one way to find outвҖҰ LETвҖҷS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: How to Buy a Budget Friendly Project Car
snippet.description:
Learn how you can buy a project car for less than the cost of a new cell phone! Project cars are great for learning how to fix a car and when you are "done" (project cars are never done), you can be proud to drive the car you fixed up!
In this series eBay Motors challenged me to buy a 24hr endurance race car for the 24hrs of Lemons race series. The car I chose had to be fast, reliable, and under $500!

eBay Motors (show them some love): https://ebayvehicle.com/app/ChrisFix

BlueDriver OBD 2 Code Scanner: https://amzn.to/2QHkn9r

The BEST Pricing on Racing Gear: https://www.stableenergies.com/
Visit Stable Energies: 175 Passaic St, Garfield, NJ 07026

вҶ’ As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases.
вҶ’ Become a ChrisFix Subscriber: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=paintballoo7

snippet.title: HAJDUK vs Е IBENIK 1:0 (26.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
NogometaЕЎi Hajduka svladali su Е ibenik 1:0 u ogledu 26. kola HT Prve lige. SpliДҮani su time bodovno opet uhvatili Rijeku, dok je Е ibenik nastavio negativan niz.

Dalmatinski derbi bio je priliДҚno izjednaДҚen. Е ibenДҚani su se hrabro suprotstavili, a uz Livaju koji je posloviДҚno vukao Hajduk, najbolji su dojam kod domaДҮina ostavile mlade snage Biuk i TekliДҮ.

S obje strane je najviЕЎe nedostajalo zavrЕЎno dodavanje ili pravi udarac, a kljuДҚni trenutak se dogodio u 72. minuti kada je 19-godiЕЎnji Marin LjubiДҚiДҮ vrlo lijepo pucao glavom s desetak metara i pogodio za tri boda Hajduka. Vrlo brzo nakon toga gosti su ostali s igraДҚem manje (drugi Еҫuti karton Alimija), a unatoДҚ tome su u zavrЕЎnici mogli izjednaДҚiti (ЕЎansa Argentinca Bailonea).

U eri Tramezzanija Hajduk je drugi put pobijedio Е ibenik, drugi put s minimalnih 1:0. Е ibenik je upisao treДҮi prvenstveni poraz u nizu, a u zadnjih ЕЎest utakmica u HT Prvoj ligi ima dva remija i ДҚetiri poraza.

HT Prva liga, 26. kolo: Hajduk - Е ibenik 1:0 (LjubiДҚiДҮ 72.)

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: LIVE: Londoners join worldwide anti-lockdown protests
snippet.description:
Londoners take to the streets on Saturday, March 20, to join the worldwide anti COVID-19 lockdown protests.
 
Similar demonstrations against the restrictions forced by the coronavirus pandemic are expected to happen in 51 countries.
 
The protests take place as many countries are facing the third wave of virus infections, with numbers of people catching the virus and its variants daily have started growing again despite vaccination efforts in place.
